sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa tawh tonkhawm leng nuam e,Buaina kinuaisiah ta,
Buaina tungah tawntung kigual zo hi.
Haksakna omlo hilo a,Haksakna kizo thei,
Topa hong om pihna kitel peuh leng.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw nuam sing, ka Topa sungah,Hong hehpihna lasa ning,
Hong itna sung tawntung ka lung muang hi.
Amah tawh tonkhawm leng nuam ei, Holim khawm leng nuam zaw laai,
Topa sungah nisim in nuam ka sa.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa nang tawh holim khawm leng, Nong hona aw za ing,
Na kammalte simin lungngaingai leng,Mit tawh na kimuh theihloh hang,
Kei nong lawn lam nong suk khak lam ka thei.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lam in diangin Topa phat ni, Kha sung kibual khawm leng,
Topa hong om pihna hong lang sak hi.
Suakta lote suahtak na tawh,Dam lote damna tawh,
Topa’n hong om pihna hong lang sak hi.
